subject: A large furry beast with tall pointed ears, wide startled eyes, and a small triangular nose peeking out from behind dense green foliage and tree trunks in a forest
description: A shaggy reddish-brown beast with oversized round eyes and tall fox-like ears hides among broad leaves and tree trunks in a sunlit forest. The creature's expression is timid and skittish — eyes wide, body mostly concealed by foliage, only the head and a paw visible as it grips a tree. Dappled green light filters through the canopy, giving the scene a soft, almost storybook quality at odds with the card's horror-set framing. The composition centers the peeking face, framed by leaves on either side like a curtain.
foreground: shaggy beast peeking from behind a tree, surrounded by broad leaves
background: dense forest with filtered sunlight through canopy
